title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Wolters IT Limited
body: "Application number 5088  Applicant Wolters Kluwer (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Wolters IT Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 12 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Wolters IT Limited is changed to 15569629, LTD. "
